---
name: Release 0.1 Checklist
about: Track the remaining work for the first public release.
title: "Release 0.1 checklist"
labels: release
---

## Release goals

- [ ] README is accurate for the current product scope
- [ ] Linux CI build passes
- [ ] Windows CI build passes
- [ ] Core unit tests pass
- [ ] Setup window works for first-run onboarding
- [ ] Release packaging approach is chosen for Linux and Windows
- [ ] Known limitations are documented

## Post-release follow-up

- [ ] Linux overlay dock/taskbar behavior revisit
- [ ] Wayland/Hyprland overlay backend investigation
- [ ] Signed distributables and installer work
